[[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]]<ref name="EpIAdv-Anakin">''[[Episode I Adventures 5: The Ghostling Children]]'' tells a continuous story with the next three ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Adventures]]'' books, and {{FactFile|12|ANA 1-4|Anakin Skywalker}} states that Anakin Skywalker was between the ages of 5 and 9 during the events of the books, giving a range of [[37 BBY/Legends|37]]–[[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. ''The Ghostling Children'' also depicts Anakin as older than the eight-year-old Arawynne, putting the books in 33 BBY.</ref>
|series=''[[Star Wars: Episode I Adventures]]''
|preceded by=[[Episode I Adventures 5: The Ghostling Children|The Ghostling Children]]
|followed by=[[Episode I Adventures 7: Capture Arawynne|Capture Arawynne]]
}}
'''''Episode I Adventures 6: The Hunt for Anakin Skywalker''''' was the sixth installment of ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Adventures]]'' written by [[Dave Wolverton]] and published by [[Scholastic]] in 2000.

{{Book-stub}}

==Publisher's summary==
''Anakin Skywalker and his friends have helped to free a group of Ghostling slaves. Now their owner, Gardulla the Hutt, wants to find out who's responsible. And the Hutt wants revenge.''

''Some of the best trackers on the planet of Tatooine are searching for Anakin.''

''Will he be caught?''
